rules.rule_text:
rule diamond_fox
{
	meta:
		author = "Brian Wallace @botnet_hunter"
		author_email = "bwall@ballastsecurity.net"
		date = "2015-08-22"
		description = "Identify DiamondFox"

	strings:
		$s1 = "UPDATE_B"
		$s2 = "UNISTALL_B"
		$s3 = "S_PROTECT"
		$s4 = "P_WALLET"
		$s5 = "GR_COMMAND"
		$s6 = "FTPUPLOAD"

	condition:
		all of them
}
